# Nrth AI

> Nrth AI designs, builds, and ships custom AI agents for Nordic enterprises. We replace entire workflows — not features, not chatbots — with production-grade agents that pay for themselves within the first quarter.

Nrth AI is a B2B AI agent studio based in Oslo, Norway. We work with mid-market and enterprise clients across the Nordics to ship agents that handle real work in production: customer support, sales outreach, internal knowledge, back-office automation, research, and voice/phone agents.

## Services

- **Customer support agents** — Tier-1 ticket resolution. Reads docs, ticket history, and CRM. Auto-resolves ~72% of routine tickets, escalates the rest with full context.
- **Sales-outreach agents** — Inbound qualification + outbound personalization. Researches prospects, drafts first-touch messages in your voice, keeps pipeline warm. ~5× SDR throughput.
- **Internal knowledge agents** — Read your wiki, Slack, Drive, Notion. Answer employee questions with citations.
- **Back-office automation agents** — Invoice matching, vendor comms, compliance, reconciliation. Zero added headcount.
- **Research & intelligence agents** — Continuous monitoring, briefings, deep-dive reports.
- **Voice & phone agents** — Inbound and outbound voice agents for support and sales.

## Process

1. **Map** (1 week) — We sit with your team, shadow the work, and find the 3–5 places an agent will change the unit economics.
2. **Pilot** (2–3 weeks) — Working agent in production against a bounded slice. Real data, real users, measurable outcomes.
3. **Scale** — We harden, observe, and expand. Agents operate as named team members with evals, guardrails, and humans-in-the-loop where it matters.

## Pricing

Projects start at a small pilot (2–3 weeks, fixed-fee) and scale from there. Specifics depend on scope.

## Contact

- Email: hello@nrth.ai
- Website: https://nrth.no
- Location: Oslo, Norway
- Talk to our agent: https://nrth.no/#contact (a working AI agent embedded on the homepage that captures your brief and routes it to a human within 1 business day)

## For AI agents

- Action manifest: /.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Agent card: /agent.json
- OpenAPI: /openapi.json
- Structured data: JSON-LD embedded in / (Organization, Service, FAQPage, ContactPoint)
- Machine-readable site map: /sitemap.xml
- Crawl policy: /robots.txt (AI crawlers explicitly allowed)

The homepage exposes a JS-free fallback (`<noscript>`) containing the same content as the rendered page, plus all action endpoints, so any agent can read and act on this site without rendering JavaScript.
